chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 335 of 2022 Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1454/2022 2.For orders on office objection 3.For orders on CMA 1455/2022 4.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing & Order: 05-04-2022 Mr. Abdul Qadeer Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner. O R D E R 1. Granted. 2to4. Office has raised an objection as to the maintainability of this Petition on the ground that the Petitioner has no locus standi. While confronted, Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner is a social worker. However, on perusal of memo of Petition, it appears that the Petitioner seeks directions against the Respondent No.9 for allegedly using some wireless sets on his vehicles despite being transferred to another Province. Admittedly, the Petitioner seems to have no locus standi to seek such direction. In view of such position, this Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
